taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: SQL, Power BI, Power Automate, Power Query M, Python
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Power BI:0.0, Power Automate:0.0, Power Query M:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's or Master's in Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Statistics, Math, or Computer Science or equivalent combination of experience, 4+ years of experience working with large datasets using SQL, 3+ years of experience using Power BI, Power Automate, Power Query M for reporting and data visualization, Proficiency with Python and/or R, Experience building data pipelines via Fabric, Snowflake, dbt, Fivetran, AWS, or an equivalent, Ability to connect to multiple data sources, Ability to self-start and self-direct work in an unstructured environment, Must be extremely collaborative and comfortable dealing with ambiguity, Ability to quickly learn new concepts and products, Attention to detail with ability to think strategically
preferred_quals: Payments experience, Insurance experience, Fabric machine learning tools
core_responsibilities: Support the Vendor Network data function by building data visualizations, automated reporting tools, dashboards, and presentations, Build predictive models to target customers for existing and new products, Produce statistical analyses to identify areas for process optimization and measure intervention impacts, Maintain and develop operational metrics and define core metrics to measure the impact of enhancements, monitor risks, and drive revenue growth, Conduct exploratory data analysis to understand user behavior, product trends, and areas of opportunity, Acquire and clean data from multiple sources, build pipelines, and schedule queries and data refreshes, Coordinate research requests with internal and external stakeholders and provide deliverables in a timely manner, Conduct new product/feature opportunity analyses to prioritize development efforts, Work with stakeholders to scope new project requests and measure success
job_summary: One Inc is a leading company in the insurtech space, providing a full suite of inbound and outbound payment solutions. They are seeking a Data Analyst III to support the Vendor Network data function by building data visualizations and predictive models, as well as conducting statistical analyses to drive business growth.
